name: Mix and Match Bean Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Beans, navy or Great Northern, dry
1/4 cup Beans, garbanzo or pink, dry
1/4 cup Beans, red or kidney, dry
1/4 cup Beans, black or pinto, dry
2 tbsp Celery or green pepper, flakes (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag or airtight container, combine the dry beans.
They need to soak, so they are packaged separately from seasonings.
2. In another bag or container, mix together the remaining ingredients.
3. Seal tightly and store until needed.
4. This recipe makes 1 2/3 cups total.
